description: Your AI's DFW guide: events, appraisals, Dallas 311, crime, floods, schools, utilities, districts.
name: io.github.LizzleChen/local-dfw-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Optional Ticketmaster Discovery API key — adds concerts/sports/theater to dfw_events. Free (5000 calls/day) at https://developer.ticketmaster.com. City calendars work without it.
environmentVariables.name: DFW_TICKETMASTER_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional Socrata app token — raises the shared per-IP rate limit for Dallas open-data queries. Free at https://dev.socrata.com/register. Works fine without it.
environmentVariables.name: DFW_SODA_APP_TOKEN
